trigger_examples: reframe this roadmap around outcomes; are we a feature factory; turn this output into an outcome; which product risk is biggest
notes: Outcome-over-output framing, four product risks, build-trap diagnosis. Reframes in place — no template.

trigger_examples: build an opportunity solution tree; map opportunities for this outcome; how do these solutions ladder up to a goal
notes: Opportunity solution tree from a desired outcome to opportunities, solutions, and assumption tests.

trigger_examples: what job are customers hiring us for; map the job to be done; write desired-outcome statements; which needs are underserved
notes: Jobs-to-be-done, job map, desired-outcome statements, importance-vs-satisfaction ranking.

trigger_examples: what is our riskiest assumption; map our assumptions; design an experiment to test this; how do we de-risk this bet
notes: Assumption mapping across desirability/viability/feasibility and choosing the cheapest experiment for the riskiest assumption.

trigger_examples: scope an MVP; what is the smallest thing that tests value; are we close to product-market fit; define the MVP feature set
notes: Lean product process and product-market-fit pyramid — target customer to underserved need to value prop to minimal MVP.
